feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Twin Brothers Are The Same But Different BORN DIFFERENT

link.title: Twin Brothers Are The Same But Different BORN DIFFERENT

entry.content: TWIN brothers Oliver and Harry are non-identical in more ways than one, but they don’t let their differences come in the way of their special bond. Oliver and Harry Beswick, aged 15, are fraternal twins from Stoke-On-Trent. The boys were born two months premature, weighing only three pounds each. Harry was born with Goldenhar Syndrome, a rare congenital defect which meant he was born with no features on the left-hand side of his face. Harry was also diagnosed with autism and has the functioning skills of a 4-year-old. Their mum, Charlie, told Truly: “The biggest thing my boys have taught me is there’s no such thing as perfect and imperfectly perfect is good enough.”
entry.summary: TWIN brothers Oliver and Harry are non-identical in more ways than one, but they don’t let their differences come in the way of their special bond. Oliver and Harry Beswick, aged 15, are fraternal twins from Stoke-On-Trent. The boys were born two months premature, weighing only three pounds each. Harry was born with Goldenhar Syndrome, a rare congenital defect which meant he was born with no features on the left-hand side of his face. Harry was also diagnosed with autism and has the functioning skills of a 4-year-old. Their mum, Charlie, told Truly: “The biggest thing my boys have taught me is there’s no such thing as perfect and imperfectly perfect is good enough.”

entry.title: Oradour-sur-Glane : le village martyr profané

link.title: Oradour-sur-Glane : le village martyr profané

entry.content:
Le 10 juin 1944, 642 hommes, femmes et enfants avaient été massacrés à Oradour-sur-Glane. 76 ans après cet événement, symbole de la barbarie nazie, la ville martyr a été profanée samedi 22 août, et une enquête a été ouverte.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le 10 juin 1944, 642 hommes, femmes et enfants avaient été massacrés à Oradour-sur-Glane. 76 ans après cet événement, symbole de la barbarie nazie, la ville martyr a été profanée samedi 22 août, et une enquête a été ouverte. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Hardik Pandya shares son Agastya’s Cute & Stylist Picture on Instgram story, See Pic वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Hardik Pandya shares son Agastya’s Cute & Stylist Picture on Instgram story, See Pic वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
IPL 2020: Hardik Pandya shares son Agastya’s Stylist Picture on Instgram story. Hardik has posted many photos and videos on social media. Hardik has been continuously sharing his son’s photo on social media ever since he became a father. Hardik has shared a photo of his son on Instagram story in which he has worn glasses on his eyes while making his son stylish.
हार्दिक पांड्या सोशल मीडिया पर काफी एक्टिव हैं. हाल के समय में हार्दिक ने कई सारी फोटो और वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर पोस्ट की है. वहीं हार्दिक जब से पिता बने हैं तब से लेकर अबतक लगातार अपने बेटे की फोटो सोशल मीडीया पर शेयर कर रहे हैं. अब हार्दिक ने अपने बेटे की एक फोटो इंस्टाग्राम स्टोरी पर शेयर की है जिसमें उन्होंने अपने बेटे को स्टाइलिश बनाते हुए आखों पर चश्मा पहना दिया है.
#HardikPandya #NatashaStankovic #HardikNatashaSon
entry.summary: IPL 2020: Hardik Pandya shares son Agastya’s Stylist Picture on Instgram story. Hardik has posted many photos and videos on social media. Hardik has been continuously sharing his son’s photo on social media ever since he became a father. Hardik has shared a photo of his son on Instagram story in which he has worn glasses on his eyes while making his son stylish. हार्दिक पांड्या सोशल मीडिया पर काफी एक्टिव हैं. हाल के समय में हार्दिक ने कई सारी फोटो और वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर पोस्ट की है. वहीं हार्दिक जब से पिता बने हैं तब से लेकर अबतक लगातार अपने बेटे की फोटो सोशल मीडीया पर शेयर कर रहे हैं. अब हार्दिक ने अपने बेटे की एक फोटो इंस्टाग्राम स्टोरी पर शेयर की है जिसमें उन्होंने अपने बेटे को स्टाइलिश बनाते हुए आखों पर चश्मा पहना दिया है. #HardikPandya #NatashaStankovic #HardikNatashaSon

entry.title: Pawan Kalyan Will Team Up With Director Surender Reddy! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Pawan Kalyan Will Team Up With Director Surender Reddy! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
If sources are to be believed, Pawan will soon be teaming up with director Surender Reddy. Known for his stylish movie making, Surender Reddy is waiting for a star her since the release of ‘Sye Raa’. As his previous associate Vakkantam Vamsi who pens all his stories has turned into a director, Surender Reddy will now team up with a new writer.
#PawanKalyan
#SurenderReddy
#VakkantamVamsi
#VakeelSaab
#HarishShankar
#SyeRaa
#Tollywood
టాలీవుడ్ ఇండస్ట్రీలో కాంబినేషన్స్ కి ఎలాంటి క్రేజ్ ఉంటుందో స్పెషల్ గా చెప్పనవసరం లేదు. ఒక్కసారి సక్సెస్ అయిన వారు మరోసారి కలిస్తే ఆ సినిమా బాక్సాఫీస్ వద్ద మినిమమ్ వసూళ్లను అందుకుంటుందని చెప్పవచ్చు.
ఇక పవన్ కళ్యాణ్, సురేందర్ రెడ్డి కాంబినేషన్ లో కూడా ఒక సినిమా రానున్నట్లు చాలా బలంగా ఒక టాక్ వినిపిస్తోంది.
entry.summary: If sources are to be believed, Pawan will soon be teaming up with director Surender Reddy. Known for his stylish movie making, Surender Reddy is waiting for a star her since the release of ‘Sye Raa’. As his previous associate Vakkantam Vamsi who pens all his stories has turned into a director, Surender Reddy will now team up with a new writer. #PawanKalyan #SurenderReddy #VakkantamVamsi #VakeelSaab #HarishShankar #SyeRaa #Tollywood టాలీవుడ్ ఇండస్ట్రీలో కాంబినేషన్స్ కి ఎలాంటి క్రేజ్ ఉంటుందో స్పెషల్ గా చెప్పనవసరం లేదు. ఒక్కసారి సక్సెస్ అయిన వారు మరోసారి కలిస్తే ఆ సినిమా బాక్సాఫీస్ వద్ద మినిమమ్ వసూళ్లను అందుకుంటుందని చెప్పవచ్చు. ఇక పవన్ కళ్యాణ్, సురేందర్ రెడ్డి కాంబినేషన్ లో కూడా ఒక సినిమా రానున్నట్లు చాలా బలంగా ఒక టాక్ వినిపిస్తోంది.

entry.title: Pour le retour de Quotidien, Yann Barthes parodie Tik-Tok dans une vidéo et annonce toute une série de nouveautés à partir de lundi sur TMC

link.title: Pour le retour de Quotidien, Yann Barthes parodie Tik-Tok dans une vidéo et annonce toute une série de nouveautés à partir de lundi sur TMC

entry.content:
Hier, jeanmarcmorandini.com vous a annoncé en exclusivité les noms des invités des talks-shows de la rentrée, mais on en sait également plus sur les nouveautés de Quotidien. Le ministre de l’Éducation nationale Jean-Michel Blanquer, la comédienne Valérie Lemercier et le chanteur Julien Doré seront donc au rendez-vous, mais les téléspectateurs vont également noter l’arrivée de la journaliste Ambre Chalumeau qui tiendra une rubrique intitulée La Bac, pour La Brigade des Affaires Culturelles. Elle y décodera les produits, les tendances et les oeuvres de l’actualité culturelle. Côté reporter, c’est également un nouveau visage qui sera désormais en charge de l’actualité politique, Sophie Dupont, déjà journaliste pour l’émission et anciennement à BFM-TV, reprendra ainsi le rôle tenu jusque là par Sahlia Brakhlia, partie pour Franceinfo .
Maïa Mazaurette, qui assurait déjà une chronique dans l’émission la saison dernière, reprendra du service. Elle assurera la chronique intitulée la Zone Mazaurette, et analysera les nouveaux comportements amoureux, les questions liées à l’identité, au genre et au sexe.
Laura Felpin, l’humoriste qui n’intervenait que le vendredi la saison dernière prendra du galon puisqu’elle sera désormais présente quotidiennement et présentera une météo "jamais vue avec sa galerie de personnages".
A noter également que la production de Quotidien a fait le choix de ne plus accueillir de public, contrairement à Cyril Hanouna qui a décidé de recevoir que 50% du public possible sur le plateau de Touche pas à mon poste.
entry.summary: Hier, jeanmarcmorandini.com vous a annoncé en exclusivité les noms des invités des talks-shows de la rentrée, mais on en sait également plus sur les nouveautés de Quotidien. Le ministre de l’Éducation nationale Jean-Michel Blanquer, la comédienne Valérie Lemercier et le chanteur Julien Doré seront donc au rendez-vous, mais les téléspectateurs vont également noter l’arrivée de la journaliste Ambre Chalumeau qui tiendra une rubrique intitulée La Bac, pour La Brigade des Affaires Culturelles. Elle y décodera les produits, les tendances et les oeuvres de l’actualité culturelle. Côté reporter, c’est également un nouveau visage qui sera désormais en charge de l’actualité politique, Sophie Dupont, déjà journaliste pour l’émission et anciennement à BFM-TV, reprendra ainsi le rôle tenu jusque là par Sahlia Brakhlia, partie pour Franceinfo . Maïa Mazaurette, qui assurait déjà une chronique dans l’émission la saison dernière, reprendra du service. Elle assurera la chronique intitulée la Zone Mazaurette, et analysera les nouveaux comportements amoureux, les questions liées à l’identité, au genre et au sexe. Laura Felpin, l’humoriste qui n’intervenait que le vendredi la saison dernière prendra du galon puisqu’elle sera désormais présente quotidiennement et présentera une météo "jamais vue avec sa galerie de personnages". A noter également que la production de Quotidien a fait le choix de ne plus accueillir de public, contrairement à Cyril Hanouna qui a décidé de recevoir que 50% du public possible sur le plateau de Touche pas à mon poste.

entry.title: Several JD(U) MLAs in touch with RJD: Tej Pratap after his father-in-law switched sides

link.title: Several JD(U) MLAs in touch with RJD: Tej Pratap after his father-in-law switched sides

entry.content: Chandrika Rai, father-in-law of RJD leader Tej Pratap Yadav joined JD(U) on August 20. Speaking on this, Tej Pratap Yadav said many JD(U) MLAs are in touch with RJD and will give news within 4 to 5 days. “Janta Dal (United) won’t gain anything from Chandrika Rai joining their party. In fact, many JD(U) MLAs are in touch with us and we will give you news of them joining RJD within 4-5 days,” said Yadav.
entry.summary: Chandrika Rai, father-in-law of RJD leader Tej Pratap Yadav joined JD(U) on August 20. Speaking on this, Tej Pratap Yadav said many JD(U) MLAs are in touch with RJD and will give news within 4 to 5 days. “Janta Dal (United) won’t gain anything from Chandrika Rai joining their party. In fact, many JD(U) MLAs are in touch with us and we will give you news of them joining RJD within 4-5 days,” said Yadav.

entry.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 2 Stage 2 - 3D Analysis

link.title: #TDF2020 - Étape 2 Stage 2 - 3D Analysis

entry.content:
Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel.
The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel.
Plus d’informations sur / More information on:
Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020
© Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr
entry.summary: Initialement prévu du 27 juin au 19 juillet, le Tour de France se déroulera sur le parcours prévu, sans changement, de Nice à Paris, du samedi 29 août au dimanche 20 septembre 2020. L’accent est mis sur une visite de l’ensemble des massifs montagneux du territoire : l’étalement, la variété et la raideur atypique des ascensions mettront à disposition des grimpeurs ambitieux des opportunités tout au long de l’épreuve, de l’arrivée d’Orcières-Merlette au chrono de la Planche-des-Belles-Filles, en passant par le Puy Mary, le Grand Colombier ou le col de la Loze en surplomb de Méribel. The Tour de France 2020 defining characteristic is the inclusion of all the mountain ranges in France. The spread-out, varied and exceptionally steep climbs will give ambitious climbers one opportunity after another throughout the race, from the finish at Orcières-Merlette to the time trial on La Planche des Belles Filles, not to mention the Puy Mary, the Grand Colombier and the Col de la Loze, overhanging Méribel. Plus d’informations sur / More information on: Hashtag officiel / Official Hashtag: #TDF2020 © Amaury Sport Organisation - www.aso.fr

entry.title: Toddler Ring Bearer Throws Away the Pillow Along With Rings

link.title: Toddler Ring Bearer Throws Away the Pillow Along With Rings

entry.content: This adorable toddler was given the task of being a ring bearer at his aunt’s wedding. However, he did not feel up to the job and threw the pillow along with the rings to the ground. The amused audience laughed.
entry.summary: This adorable toddler was given the task of being a ring bearer at his aunt’s wedding. However, he did not feel up to the job and threw the pillow along with the rings to the ground. The amused audience laughed.

entry.title: ‘Pig deal’ with China raises fears in Argentina over potential virus outbreak

link.title: ‘Pig deal’ with China raises fears in Argentina over potential virus outbreak

entry.content: A government plan to turn Argentina into a pork powerhouse with Chinese investment is generating unprecedented resistance from the Argentinian general public. Environmental activists, who are worried about potential virus outbreaks from industrial-scale pig farming, gathered in the capital Buenos Aires on August 25, 2020. Some clashed with police during a protest against a deal with China to invest billions of dollars in the local hog industry to produce pork for export.
entry.summary: A government plan to turn Argentina into a pork powerhouse with Chinese investment is generating unprecedented resistance from the Argentinian general public. Environmental activists, who are worried about potential virus outbreaks from industrial-scale pig farming, gathered in the capital Buenos Aires on August 25, 2020. Some clashed with police during a protest against a deal with China to invest billions of dollars in the local hog industry to produce pork for export.

entry.title: Prof. Dr. Oğuztürk uyardı: ‘Deride döküntü Covid-19 belirtisi olabilir’

link.title: Prof. Dr. Oğuztürk uyardı: ‘Deride döküntü Covid-19 belirtisi olabilir’

entry.content: Ankara Şehir Hastanesi Acil Tıp Kliniği İdari ve Eğitim Sorumlusu Prof. Dr. Hakan Oğuztürk, corona virüs tanısı konan hastalarda, semptomların ve şikayetlerin değişiklik gösterebildiğini belirtti. Prof. Dr. Oğuztürk, “Deri döküntülerinin başka sebeplerini dışladıktan sonra, Covid-19 ile ilintili olabilecek bu problemlerin de karşımıza çıktığını net olarak söyleyebilirim” dedi.
entry.summary: Ankara Şehir Hastanesi Acil Tıp Kliniği İdari ve Eğitim Sorumlusu Prof. Dr. Hakan Oğuztürk, corona virüs tanısı konan hastalarda, semptomların ve şikayetlerin değişiklik gösterebildiğini belirtti. Prof. Dr. Oğuztürk, “Deri döküntülerinin başka sebeplerini dışladıktan sonra, Covid-19 ile ilintili olabilecek bu problemlerin de karşımıza çıktığını net olarak söyleyebilirim” dedi.

entry.title: Congress Political Crisis: Sonia Gandhi ने नियुक्तियों में ‘असंतुष्‍टों’ के कतरे पर वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Congress Political Crisis: Sonia Gandhi ने नियुक्तियों में ‘असंतुष्‍टों’ के कतरे पर वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The party has started taking action against leaders who had ‘letter bomb’ against Sonia Gandhi in Congress. The 23 disgruntled leaders who wrote a letter to the interim president Sonia Gandhi, demanding a major change in the party, have now come under target. In fact, on Thursday, the Congress has formed a 10-member committee to decide the party’s strategy on subjects related to Parliament. Five members of both houses have been included in this. But the leaders who wrote letters have been sidelined in the new appointments of Parliament or they have been given Qatar ..
कांग्रेस में सोनिया गांधी के खिलाफ ‘लेटर बम’ फोड़ने वाले नेताओं के खिलाफ पार्टी ने कार्रवाई शुरू कर दी है। जिन 23 असंतुष्ट नेताओं ने अंतरिम अध्यक्ष सोनिया गांधी को चिट्ठी लिख कर पार्टी में बड़े बदलाव की मांग की थी वो अब निशाने पर आ गए हैं. दरअसल गुरुवार को कांग्रेस ने संसद से जुड़े विषयों पर पार्टी की रणनीति तय करने के लिए 10 सदस्यीय समिति बनाई है. इसमें दोनों सदनों के पांच-पांच सदस्यों को शामिल गया है. लेकिन चिट्ठी लिखने वाले नेताओं को संसद की नई नियुक्तियों में दरकिनार कर दिया है या उनके पर कतर दिए ..
#CongressPoliticalCrisis #SoniaGandhi
entry.summary: The party has started taking action against leaders who had ‘letter bomb’ against Sonia Gandhi in Congress. The 23 disgruntled leaders who wrote a letter to the interim president Sonia Gandhi, demanding a major change in the party, have now come under target. In fact, on Thursday, the Congress has formed a 10-member committee to decide the party’s strategy on subjects related to Parliament. Five members of both houses have been included in this. But the leaders who wrote letters have been sidelined in the new appointments of Parliament or they have been given Qatar .. कांग्रेस में सोनिया गांधी के खिलाफ ‘लेटर बम’ फोड़ने वाले नेताओं के खिलाफ पार्टी ने कार्रवाई शुरू कर दी है। जिन 23 असंतुष्ट नेताओं ने अंतरिम अध्यक्ष सोनिया गांधी को चिट्ठी लिख कर पार्टी में बड़े बदलाव की मांग की थी वो अब निशाने पर आ गए हैं. दरअसल गुरुवार को कांग्रेस ने संसद से जुड़े विषयों पर पार्टी की रणनीति तय करने के लिए 10 सदस्यीय समिति बनाई है. इसमें दोनों सदनों के पांच-पांच सदस्यों को शामिल गया है. लेकिन चिट्ठी लिखने वाले नेताओं को संसद की नई नियुक्तियों में दरकिनार कर दिया है या उनके पर कतर दिए .. #CongressPoliticalCrisis #SoniaGandhi

entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - Bryan Coquard : ‘Un gros vide dans ma carrière de ne pas faire ces Tours de France’

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - Bryan Coquard : ‘Un gros vide dans ma carrière de ne pas faire ces Tours de France’

entry.content: Trois ans que Bryan Coquard n’avait pas pris le départ d’un Tour de France. Sur ce Tour Bryan Coquard, Pierre Rolland, Jens Debusschere, Kévin Réza, Quentin Pacher et Cyril Gautier, Cyril Barthe et Maxime Chevalier ont été choisi par le manager général Jérôme Pineau pour représenter l’équipe B&B Hotels-Vital Concept sur ce Tour de France 2020.
entry.summary: Trois ans que Bryan Coquard n’avait pas pris le départ d’un Tour de France. Sur ce Tour Bryan Coquard, Pierre Rolland, Jens Debusschere, Kévin Réza, Quentin Pacher et Cyril Gautier, Cyril Barthe et Maxime Chevalier ont été choisi par le manager général Jérôme Pineau pour représenter l’équipe B&B Hotels-Vital Concept sur ce Tour de France 2020.

entry.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 53 Teaser ARY Digital Drama

link.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 53 Teaser ARY Digital Drama

entry.content:
New
Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law.
#AlizehShah #YasirNawaz #MeraDilMeraDushman
Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama)
Written By: Mirza Asim Baig
Cast:
Yasir Nawaz
Alizey Shah
Noman Sami
Laiba Khan
Amna Malik
Salman Saeed
Shazia Gohar
Anam Tanveer
Naveed Raza
Akbar Islam
Gul E Rana
Fareeda Shabir
Fatima Sohail
Saba Shah
Malik Raza
Asiya Irshad
New Timings :
Watch Mera Dil Mera Dushman Monday Tuesday & Wednesday at 9:00 Pm only on ARY Digital
entry.summary: New Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law. #AlizehShah #YasirNawaz #MeraDilMeraDushman Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama) Written By: Mirza Asim Baig Cast: Yasir Nawaz Alizey Shah Noman Sami Laiba Khan Amna Malik Salman Saeed Shazia Gohar Anam Tanveer Naveed Raza Akbar Islam Gul E Rana Fareeda Shabir Fatima Sohail Saba Shah Malik Raza Asiya Irshad New Timings : Watch Mera Dil Mera Dushman Monday Tuesday & Wednesday at 9:00 Pm only on ARY Digital

entry.title: Coronavirus : à Marseille, une situation « très tendue »

link.title: Coronavirus : à Marseille, une situation « très tendue »

entry.content: Les autorités tirent le signal d’alarme concernant la situation sanitaire à Marseille. « La situation est très tendue. On ne peut pas payer pour voir. On va mettre un coup de frein à Marseille », a fait savoir un proche du Premier ministre Jean Castex au journal « La Provence ». Selon » La Provence », Olivier Véran et Jean Castex pourraient effectuer une visite à Marseille dans la semaine. « La situation est suffisamment alarmante pour que des mesures complémentaires puissent être envisagées », a avancé Christophe Mirmand, préfet de la région Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur, relayé par l’Agence France-Presse.
entry.summary: Les autorités tirent le signal d’alarme concernant la situation sanitaire à Marseille. « La situation est très tendue. On ne peut pas payer pour voir. On va mettre un coup de frein à Marseille », a fait savoir un proche du Premier ministre Jean Castex au journal « La Provence ». Selon » La Provence », Olivier Véran et Jean Castex pourraient effectuer une visite à Marseille dans la semaine. « La situation est suffisamment alarmante pour que des mesures complémentaires puissent être envisagées », a avancé Christophe Mirmand, préfet de la région Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur, relayé par l’Agence France-Presse.

entry.title: Taïwan : une fille de 3 ans projetée en l’air par un cerf-volant

link.title: Taïwan : une fille de 3 ans projetée en l’air par un cerf-volant

entry.content: Grosse frayeur lors du festival international de Hsinchu. Une fillette a été projetée en l’air, à plus de 10 mètres du sol, par la queue d’un cerf-volant géant.
entry.summary: Grosse frayeur lors du festival international de Hsinchu. Une fillette a été projetée en l’air, à plus de 10 mètres du sol, par la queue d’un cerf-volant géant.
